case_title: FERNANDEZ, GILBERT et al vs. FU, DONG XING et al

docket_entries.description: CASE CONSOLIDATED WITH 110372; STATUS CONF DATE OF 3/14/95 IS VACATED; NEW DATE IS 5/5/95; ASSIGNED ARB LINDBERG IS NOW ARB FOR THE CONSOLIDATED CASES; NEW DATES OF 12/27/94 THRU 3/27/95 APPLY; ALL PARTIES NOTIFIED OF THESE CHANGES.
ARBITRATOR APPOINTED, LINDBERG, DARELL DEAN (108038), ARB-5 MAILED
NOTICE OF INTENT TO INTRODUCE REPORTS AND DOCUMENTS AT ARBITRATION (RULE 1613) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FERNANDEZ, GILBERT QUITEVES, CRESCENCIA

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FERNANDEZ, GILBERT QUITEVES, CRESCENCIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FU, DONG XING $21,598.30 PRINCIPAL, $1,390.38 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $22,988.68, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR: DEFENDANT TO PAY $6803 TO GILBERT FERNANDEZ, $8172 TO ROSE FERNANDEZ, AND $6623.30 TO CRESCENCIA QUITEVES. STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFFS.
